entry.title: Migration of EHANA to Datasphere by leveraging Native HANA Cloud Instance of Datasphere Tenant
entry.content:
Prerequisites

It is expected from reader of this blog to already have acquainted with basic understanding of SAP HANA Cloud and SAP Datasphere.

System Readiness:To leverage HANA Cloud Instance of Datasphere (Native HANA), below set of prerequisites should be completed:

  1. SAP BTP Space Access
  2. SAP Datasphere tenant and SAP Business Technology Platform subaccount must be in the same data center (for example, eu10, us10)
  3. Subscribed to SAP HANA Schemas & HDI Containers service in Cloud Foundry Space
  4. Business Application Studio (BAS) subscription on same BTP Subaccount

Introduction

This document primarily facilitates the understanding of migrating from EHANA to Datasphere by utilizing the underlying HANA Cloud instance within Datasphere. Additionally, it outlines the quick setup steps for this process. This approach represents a Potential use case for Datasphere, enabling the benefits of both EHANA legacy models and new models within Datasphere. Consequently, it eliminates the need for manual transitioning of legacy models to Datasphere models.

SAP Datasphere is a public cloud software as a service (SaaS) data warehouse. SAP Datasphere supports a business data warehouse architecture that harmonizes data across the enterprise. It includes services for data modeling, data integration, cataloging, and data warehousing across SAP and non-SAP data. With the aim of facilitating and accelerating decision-making, SAP Datasphere is a tool designed for both experts from the world of analytics and key business users. In terms of interfaces, the duality between technical and business users is reflected in the ‘Data Builder’ layer, dedicated to integration and modelling, and the ‘Business Builder’ layer, dedicated to semantics and business rules. Datasphere is application layer and it’s powered by HANA Cloud beneath it.

1 – Datasphere Capabilities

 

Commonly adopted migration Approach: Migrating HANA On-prem artifacts to XSA and in future again convert those XSA objects to Datasphere models as innovate story.

New Innovate migration Approach: Migrating HANA On-prem artifacts directly to Datasphere by leveraging Native HANA Cloud layer of Datasphere.

 

Use Case - What is Need!!

With SAP announcing the end of XSC support by 2025, there is a significant demand among SAP customers using XSC to migrate to either XSA or HANA Cloud to ensure the continuity of their existing analytics reports without having to completely redevelop them in a new analytical tool. This solution offers customers the opportunity to migrate legacy EHANA models to the cloud using a single Datasphere license, eliminating the need for separate XSA or HANA Cloud licenses. This positions SAP Datasphere as a unified analytical solution for their enterprise. There are other salient features highlighted as below of this design:

 

Solution

1 Overview

This solution utilizes underneath HANA Cloud DB as migration target system from XSC system. Migration from XSC to HANA Cloud steps remain same as migrating it to XSA via SAP provided Migration Tool. Following this, additional steps, detailed below, are required to successfully migrate XSC/XSA artifacts into Datasphere.

 

2 Architecture

 

2.1 – Design preview

 

Steps

1 Mapping Datasphere Tenant with BTP Space

To enable SAP SQL Data Warehousing on SAP Datasphere tenant, an S-user must create an SAP ticket for the DWC-SM component to request SAP to map SAP Datasphere tenant to SAP Business Technology Platform account. This is one time activity for each datasphere tenant.

In SAP Ticket mention below information:

  • SAP Datasphere Tenant ID
  • SAP Business Technology Platform Org GUID
  • SAP Business Technology Platform Space GUID

2 Run Migration Tool

To convert EHANA legacy models to HANA Cloud compatible artifacts, SAP has provided Migration tool. Output of this tool execution will be HANA Cloud compatible project. More details about this step documented in this SAP Standard guidebook.

3 Create HANA DB Project in BAS

Project generated from step 2 needs to be uploaded into BTP Business application studio (BAS). Create HDI Container from BTP HANA help wizard and then attach that HDI container to hdi_db service as shown below.

3.1 – Steps Overview

DWC_CONSUMPTION_ROLE and DWC_CONSUMPTION_ROLE# hdbroles needs to be created in HDI.

Once all Above depicted steps are completed successfully, build db module. If build is successful, then from database explorer data preview will be enabled for further model functionality test by previewing data.

4 Attach HDI to Datasphere Space

To reuse existing legacy models inside datasphere layer, HDI needs to be bound to space as shown below:

4.1 – Attaching HDI

Once attached, CV created inside HDI can be used as data source within datasphere layer. Currently SAP has not enabled sharing semantics, Input parameters and Variables from calculation view to Datasphere layer. SAP will be enabling this in datasphere future releases as per roadmap Q4 2024.

 

4.2 – CV as data source

Apart from this, CV created in HDI can directly consumed by front end/ reporting tools by ODBC/JDBC or OData connection.

 

Appendix A

 

                                                  Nomenclature & Acronyms

BAS

Business Application Studio

XSA/XSC

XS Advanced/ XS Classic

db

Database

CV

Calculation View

entry.title: SAP CPQ, UploadCartAttachment API issue after latest update
entry.content:
Hi, 

I have an issue with uploading attachement to the Quote using API after latest CPQ update.

With latest update of CPQ: 

https://searchtest.hana.ondemand.com/whats-new/35009742129b4f45851a5b47a3ddd413?q=upload&locale=en-US

there is following 'improvement': 

The UploadCartAttachment API (/Cart/UploadCartAttachment) has been updated. SAP CPQ has introduced AntiForgery validation for this API for security reasons. Now, when a user uses the drag and drop functionality for the Attachments feature on the Documents Tab of a Quote, SAP CPQ will send an additional token, "RequestVerificationToken," to ensure complete security.

If the API is being used, it is important to ensure that the token is sent correctly in the headers with this request.

So, before this change i was able to call this API and upload document by first calling /api/rd/v1/Core/LogIn,

after that calling /api/rd/v1/Cart/GetInitData with ownerId and cartId of quote to which i want to upload file,

and finally by calling /Cart/UploadCartAttachment (with cookies which was obtained from previous steps).

This was explained here: https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/knowledge/en/3417551

However, now I need to pass also "RequestVerificationToken" which i don't get in cookies from the steps explained above. 

Do you now if there is any other way to get this specific token? 

 

Kind regards,

Andrzej

entry.title: Re: Mock Server configuration in SAP UI5 Application.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
I am an SAP Business One Trainee Consultant from Pakistan. As a CA student, I am keen to expand my skills and knowledge in the SAP ecosystem. I am particularly interested in learning SAP Implementation and believe that the digital skills initiative by SAP Learning is a fantastic opportunity for individuals like myself. I am eager to take on the challenge and undergo the necessary training to achieve SAP Certification.

Thank you for considering my interest in this initiative.

I'm trying to deploy the Fiori Element application to S/4 Hana Cloud Public Edition

this is my ui5-deploy.yaml and btp destination

*BTP Destination is connected to client Development (080) 

I would like to know What role or authorized objects are required to deploy Fiori App and where to set it.

entry.title: Valuation WIP in different ledgers w/o Material Ledger/Actual Costing
entry.content:
Hello everyone, 

i have a customer who needs to calculate their Work in Process for various ledgers differently without Actual Costing, because we are still in the realization phase (only recommended after Go-Live).

In order to do so, we need to post the material consumptions on the production order in different ledgers with different values (SAP standard posts the same value in 0L for the other ledgers as well).

  • Did anyone have this requirement as well and implemented it without Actual Costing? 
  • How did you proceed? Was it an own development?
  • Or did you wait after Go-Live and implemented Actual Costing? 

 

Thanks for your help and Best regards

entry.title: AI capabilities in SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Hello "SAP Build"ers,

I am curious to know what are the currently present AI capabilities within SAP Build Process Automation.

For example, while designing & executing a process and decisions etc, are there AI infused content that helps predictive analysis or decision making?

Or are there any other AI-enabled features present in SAP Build Process Automation?

Warm Regards,

Amey

entry.title: Re: Group Report - Any workflow for Group Journal Entries?
entry.content:
This functionality has now been delivered with release 2302. 

But can anyone please share a config guide on how to configure the Group Reporting approver workflow. I cannot find any detailed information.

entry.title: Re: Loc.Curr.Amount is blank in MB51
entry.content:
I execute MB51 report …in some of material Doc, amount in local currency comes Zero.
why it is zero?

Ans…Amount in local is system calculated field, during GR.
you can see this field in quantity tab of MIGO.

See this 2 Material Doc,
in 5024699761- Amout in Loc cur. Field coming
in 5025018285- it is not.

What I found is….Amount in local Curr comes zero in case of…..
in PO with Acc Assign. , in Stock Transfer Order (PO with Item cat-U)
and in Non valuated GR
But not for MvtType-641.

entry.title: Re: Currency conversion in SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
Hello @paddyw 

May I ask, how you created the currency tables in your first item?

1. Create SAP currency tables/views

Did you do it manually or did you just create the remote tables? I'm asking because I think this way it is also easier to get them filled, instead of using a data flow.

BR, Martin

entry.title: Overview Page Analytics Card Bullet Chart
entry.content:
I have created an analytics card (bullet chart) in an overview page, if I want to display the card, I get an error:

 <Annotation Term="UI.Chart" Qualifier="BulletChart">
                    <Record Type="UI.ChartDefinitionType">
                        <PropertyValue Property="ChartType" EnumMember="UI.ChartType/Bullet"/>
                        <PropertyValue Property="Title" String="Bullet Chart"/>
                        <PropertyValue Property="Dimensions">
                            <Collection>
                                <PropertyPath>NettoDate</PropertyPath>
                            </Collection>
                        </PropertyValue>
                        <PropertyValue Property="DimensionAttributes">
                            <Collection>
                                <Record Type="UI.ChartDimensionAttributeType">
                                    <PropertyValue Property="Dimension" PropertyPath="NettoDate"/>
                                    <PropertyValue Property="Role" EnumMember="UI.ChartDimensionRoleType/Category"/>
                                </Record>
                            </Collection>
                        </PropertyValue>
                        <PropertyValue Property="Measures">
                            <Collection>
                                <PropertyPath>NettoWert</PropertyPath>
                            </Collection>
                        </PropertyValue>
                        <PropertyValue Property="MeasureAttributes">
                            <Collection>
                                <Record Type="UI.ChartMeasureAttributeType">
                                    <PropertyValue Property="Measure" PropertyPath="NettoWert"/>
                                    <PropertyValue Property="Role" EnumMember="UI.ChartMeasureRoleType/Axis1"/>
                                </Record>
                            </Collection>
                        </PropertyValue>
                    </Record>
                </Annotation>

I have no clue, why this happens?

entry.title: To get change report which user changed sales order user profile status and release order.
entry.content:
Hi,

 

We have created sales order profile having not released/hold/ released status in ECC6.0. So different HOD can approves order by changing user status to release. My question is how to find log or report of which user changed sales order user status. Is there any table from which we can fetch data.

Nikunj Mehta

entry.title: SAP CPI Message Mapping - Context issue
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have a requirement where i need to check if else condition of child nodes from first occurance of parent node. Below is my source structure:

<IDOC>
<E1KNA1M>  (0 to 1)
<E1KNVVM> (0 to unbounded)
<E1KNVPM> (0 to unbounded)
<PARVW>AG</PARVW> (0 to 1)
<KUNN2>111</KUNN2> (0 to 1) 
</E1KNVPM>
<E1KNVPM>
<PARVW>ZN</PARVW>
<KUNN2>222</KUNN2>
</E1KNVPM>
</E1KNVVM>
<E1KNVVM>
<E1KNVPM>
<PARVW>WE</PARVW>
<KUNN2>333</KUNN2>
</E1KNVPM>
<E1KNVPM>
<PARVW>ZN</PARVW>
<KUNN2>444</KUNN2>
</E1KNVPM>
</E1KNVVM>
</E1KNA1M>
</IDOC>

Here i need populate KUNN2 to target if PARVW is equal to ZN only from first occurance of E1KNVVM. i should suppress if there is a PARVW with ZN from any other E1KNVVM occurances. copy Value[0] will not work in this case as PARVW is inside E1KNVVM and has multiple occurances. Could you please help how can we achive this. Thanks in advance.

Thanks,

Sailaja.

entry.title: Fiori Elements Overview page - Table Card (ODATA v4 - Travel service) / Week 3 Unit 3
entry.content:
Hello,
from the openSAP course regarding Fiori Elements I am facing an issue.
Week 3 Unit 3 Creating an overview page I could not continue during Step 5 - Add a V4 Table Card.
In Guided Development Step 2 the Property Field is grayed out. I can only select the properties field for the MainService. For my second service (V4), the field remains grayed out.

It also does not matter whether the second service is provided with V2 or V4. Does anyone have a solution for this? I would like to continue the exercise.

Hi @a_figueredo,
I saw your comment on the same issue, by any chance did you find any solution for the same..

entry.title: Webclient-Deployment of an Extension - sap.insights missing
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I recently developed an application using SAPUI5, which works as expected during development. Now I wanted to deploy my application to a SAP Business One WebClient, but can't seem to get it to work.

I have used the following command for building my application:

ui5 build --config=ui5.yaml --clean-dest --dest dist

 The file "ui5.yaml" contains the following contents:

specVersion: "3.1"
metadata:
  name: myApp
type: application
framework:
  name: SAPUI5
  version: 1.123.2
  libraries:
    - name: sap.m
    - name: sap.ui.core
    - name: sap.f
    - name: sap.suite.ui.generic.template
    - name: sap.ui.comp
    - name: sap.ui.generic.app
    - name: sap.ui.table
    - name: sap.ushell
    - name: themelib_sap_horizon
    - name: sap.insights
server:
  customMiddleware:
    - name: fiori-tools-proxy
      afterMiddleware: compression
      configuration:
        ignoreCertError: true
        ui5:
          path:
            - /resources
            - /test-resources
          url: https://ui5.sap.com
        backend:
          - path: /b1s
            url: https://x.x.x.x:x
    - name: fiori-tools-appreload
      afterMiddleware: compression
      configuration:
        port: x
        path: webapp
        delay: 300
    - name: ui5-tooling-transpile-middleware
      afterMiddleware: compression
      configuration:
        debug: true
        excludePatterns:
          - /Component-preload.js
    - name: fiori-tools-preview
      afterMiddleware: fiori-tools-appreload
      configuration:
        component: myApp
        ui5Theme: sap_horizon
builder:
  customTasks:
    - name: ui5-tooling-transpile-task
      afterTask: replaceVersion
      configuration:
        debug: true

Then I used the VS Code Plugin outlined in this chapter to package my build into an MTAR-archive. So far I haven't encountered any error yet. Then I used the ExtensionManager to import the MTAR-file and assigned the extension to a CompanyDB.

However, when attempting to open the extension, I encountered two errors:

  • The WebClient showed me a popup containing the following detail: Failed to load UI5 component for navigation intent "#webclient-myApp-myApp".
  • My browser console writes, that the package sap.insights is missing. I haven't used this package explicitly in my project, so I assume, that it must be the dependency of another dependency.

I have tried multiple things so far:

  • Downgrading the SAPUI5-version used in the build to 1.120.4.
  • Using a self-contained build and including all dependencies.
  • Explicitly including the dependency sap.insights during the build.

None of these things have worked. I checked the available modules on my WebClient and sap.insights isn't amongst them. However, I can't seem to include it myself, as the resources seemingly are embedded in the file "gate.jar" and I don't think it's a good idea to alter and recompile it.

Please let me know if you have an idea on what I'm doing wrong or what I could try next, as this issue is somewhat urgent.

Thanks in advance,

Thomas

entry.title: Re: MDG DQM: Enriching product master data with derivation rules in S/4 HANA
entry.content:
Hello Anirban,

How to extend DQM derivations to custom tables, I am able to extend the DQM validation rules to custom fields and tables, but when it comes to DQM derivations, unable to see the custom tables in the Base table or Result table list.

It would be really helpful if you can provide your inputs on this.

Regards,

Arun.

entry.title: Re: setting data with SetDataSource in c#
entry.content:
In the application you mentioned in the SetData_Click method it is set by SetDataSource, however it is not set for subreports. It is also in DataSet1_Click, however there one DataSet is set for Master and subreports, which also does not work for me.

You wrote "Remember, for each result returned in the main report query the subreport runs, so if 100 records are returned in the main report the subreport runs 100 times." 

This is exactly what I want to do from C# code. Without opening the report with Designer and making changes. CR is not supposed to build and execute SQL queries, but me in my application, CR is only supposed to get a ready DataSet.

The steps I want to perform here are:

1) I want to execute a query for the master that will return 100 records. Based on this, build a DataSet and substitute it with the SetDataSource method

2) Execute another query for each returned record from the master, this time for the subreport. I would execute 100 queries and get 100 rows as a result.

2.1) If I substitute a table containing 100 rows for the subreport, I will get the error "page header or footer exceeds page length."

2.2) If I substitute a table containing 1 record for the subreport, the same data will be substituted on each page.

CR itself runs a query for the subreport for each record from the master. Maybe there is a way to catch this event? And at this point also run the query, but from my application and replace it again for the DataSet subreport

You wrote: "Note also the subreport needs to have it's data source set also, it's in the sample also. Once you get the report working in the designer you can use the DataSet in code. "

In the Designer the report works. In the attached application there is a DataSet1_Click method, I do it similarly. Even if I substitute a table with 1 row for the subreport, the report will be generated, but on each page there will be the same data in the subreport section. In my case, each page is to have different, unique data. Therefore, CR ran a separate query for each page and I don't know how to repeat such an action from the code by substituting only the DataSet.

entry.title: Re: Extending a Standard API - A Guide to Enhancing API_QUALITYNOTIFICATION
entry.content:
this is working when you are using GET method.
but it's not working in POST method, can you explain more how to get the POST method working?

entry.title: Re: Issue regarding multiple line items
entry.content: thank you i think i missed a unique key

entry.title: Re: Material not listed and allowed in to delivery
entry.content:
Hello Lakshmipathi , I have sales order that checked the material exclusion/inclusion but while creation of delivery the material date is expired and it showing incompletion log but still line item is included in the delivery .

Regards,

Kamalakar

entry.title: B1iWS Connector - B1iServerURL does not update with new hostname change
entry.content:
Good morning

 

I have amended the Server URL for the integration framework and have ensured the entry in SBOCOMMON has been updated.  The Server URL displays correctly when I look at Processing Target in my SAP B1 client setup but when the action fires, I can see from the log that it is still referencing the old B1iServer URL.  I have tried restarting the EDFBackend and the Framework services but it has made no difference.

Please can someone help me find where it is still referencing the old URL?

Many thanks

entry.title: Re: Material not listed and allowed in to delivery
entry.content: Hello Lakshmipathi , I have sales order that checked the material exclusion/inclusion but while creation of delivery the material date is expired and it showing incompletion log but still line item is included in the delivery .

entry.title: Free-Hand SQL Rights missing in 4.2 SAP BI
entry.content:
Hi,

We have installed SAP BI 4.2 SP08 Patch 3 in our servers, we have QA and PROD environments. Users are able to create reports in PROD based on Free-Hand SQL data source but unable to migrate those reports to QA or to create reports based on free-hand SQL.

Upon looking at the rights, I see the rights for Free-hand SQL are missing in System-> Relational Connection under User security for Connections but the same is available in PROD CMC.

QA user security:

 

PROD user security:

 

Please let me know on how to get the Free-Hand SQL on our QA.

 

Thanks & Regards

Vrikshika Narayanan

entry.title: CRM 7.0 EHP4 SPS update SP12 to higher: Is Preparations for the Middleware needed
entry.content:
Hi All,

For a "Support Pack Stack update" of CRM 7.0 EHP4 (NW 7.5) SP12 to higher on same EHP4 level: are the same Preparations steps for the Middleware needed like those needed for a CRM Release Upgrade?

As per SAP Guide for CRM: Upgrade and Update Guide - SAP CRM 7.0 EHP4 (URL: Upgrade and Update Guide - SAP CRM 7.0 EHP4)
Valid for ABAP, it says "You must perform this step before the upgrade downtime begins." so do all those steps (mentioned below from the guide) also apply for SPS update on same CRM 7.0 EHP4 level?

4.2 Preparations for the Middleware: -

- Deregistering CRM_SITE* Inbound Queues
- Checking the Processing of All Messages
- Checking and Stopping R&R Queues
- Deregistering R3A* Inbound Queues
- Preparing the Upgrade of Customer-Specific BDoc Types

6.2 Follow-Up Activities for the Middleware:-

- Post-Upgrade Handling of BDoc Types
- Reregistering CRM_SITE_* Queues
- Implementing an Authorization Concept for the CRM Adapter Framework
- Configuring the E-Mail ID in the MMR_CNTL Table
- Updating SAP Delivered General Filters for Existing Sites
- Regenerating Middleware Services
- Perform BDoc Merge or BDoc Structure Regeneration for Custom Modified BDoc Types
- Checking Middleware Functions (transaction MW_CHECK)
- Reregistering Inbound Queues
- Follow-Up Activities for Customer Enhancements

 

Regards,

Ashish

entry.title: Re: CAP Deployment - FIORI App Does not Appear under the HTML5 Application on BTP
entry.content: @Md-Manauwar Can you share your mta.yaml file?

entry.title: External Feedback functionality in SEN

entry.title: Re: SAP Learning Onboarding Resources
entry.content:
Hi @yuan_923 
It looks like this is a new question that is nor directly related to the blog
I would like to encourage always use our SSAP Learning Q&A  and post your question there.
This makes it easier  to follow-up:
That way other learners can benefit from the answer:
If you ask the question there other learners  can search for it in the future if they run into the same issue and there we have more features available for responses

Would you mind to repost it ?

Kind regards
Margit

Kind regards

Margit

our Ask Questions section and post your question there.

You will find this Ask Questions section here:

https://jam2.sapjam.com/groups/63Iq2ZGd7B5F3pzlJgAxFW/overview_page/x9j04nslfNDbcayc3mDPe6

 

This makes it easier  to follow-up:

That way other learners can benefit from the answer:
If you ask the question there other learners  can search for it in the future if they run into the same issue and there we have more features available for responses

 

 

Would you mind to repost it ?

 

Kind regards

Margit

entry.title: User can't create G/L Account
entry.content:
App name: Manage G/L Account Master Data

1 user can't create G/L account, even though other users can. System is 2 system landscape

This doesn't appear to be an authorization issue. We have checked this using the 'display authorization trace' app


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: User can't create G/L Account
entry.content:
This is usually an authorization issue. 

From help.sap.com documentation https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/0fa84c9d9c634132b7c4abb9ffdd8f06/86216d7396ea497ab72e766cc0e0502c.html?locale=en-US 
derived business catalog for chart of accounts configuration is 
G/L Account Master Data - Configuration (SAP_CA_BC_IC_LND_FIN_GLA_PC)


This business catalog allows for app Manage G/L Account Master Data. In q system "Create or change G/L account master data in the standard view and in the expert worklist"

 

In App Business Catalogs 
Business catalog id 
SAP_CA_BC_IC_LND_FIN_GLA_PC

Check is used in business roles

 

In app Iam information system for business roles check users roles assigned to.

Assign existing business role with catalog to user or create new role with catalog and assign to user concerned.

entry.title: Re: SAP PI - REST Receiver PDF Content application/octet-...
entry.content: Hi, could you please share the JAVA Mapping you've used to map the PDF from payload to attachment?

entry.title: Re: SAP RAP Custom entity shows correct value in excel download but on screen value is incorrect
entry.content: Hi @kunal_chandra, Does your entity have a unique set of keys? If not, List Report may display incorrect data.

entry.title: Re: Sorting on Alphanumeric column
entry.content: No screenshot visible

entry.title: Re: Add custom field in FB50 Header Basic data
entry.content: There is a BAdI to add customer field to FI document header : FI_HEADER_SUB_1300

entry.title: Re: Adobe form with RAP Based OData Service
entry.content:
@arunnaik 

Using SAP forms services by adobe should be the solution.

Free versión is limited and not sure pricing for default versión.

I am waiting for my admin colleagues to activate It on our system, so I cannot confirm if it works as expected.

entry.title: Re: Free-Hand SQL Rights missing in 4.2 SAP BI
entry.content: Check that you have the same version/SP and Patch on the QA system as PROD

entry.title: Re: Free-Hand SQL Rights missing in 4.2 SAP BI
entry.content:
Hi,

Thanks for your response.

We have the exact same version, SP and Patch on both our systems.

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Error while opening a PDF created by a smartform
entry.content:

  • Check value of VBRK-ZTERM vs table T052
  • Look also at BP / Customer attributes

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Dear David,

I would like to express my interest in being part of the digital skills initiative. As a recent graduate, I have personally experienced how technology can significantly close gaps in less developed areas. Having a background in business information technology, and a strong interest in digital innovation, I'm excited to contribute and gain from an initiative that helps people like me succeed in the digital economy. I believe this will be a tremendous opportunity for me to develop my abilities and contribute a new, robust viewpoint influenced by my experiences.

Best regards,

Ann

entry.title: RVV50R10C user profile customizing vs. Variant
entry.content:
Hi,

we setup RVV50R10C as a job with a Variant. 

In the tab User Role for our Variant we select a User Profile and flag the field "List of blocked documents" as 1 (List contains only blocked orders) to avoid duplicated delivery creation.

However in the CUstomizing of the User Profile the field "List of blocked documents" is marked as BLANK (Construct list without document block).

Now during several Job runs we sitll got duplicated deliveries.

Does the customizing of the User Profile overwrite the Variant when executed as a Job in Background?

SNote https://me.sap.com/notes/1454193/ only gave hint regarding customizing.

Thank you in advance

entry.title: Connection between tables in SAC
entry.content: How to import and connect two tables in one model in SAP SAC

entry.title: 🔵 Best of SAP BW Features in SAP Datasphere
entry.content: In this session, Sandy Tran from the Product Management team of SAP Datasphere will introduce the implemented features from SAP Business Warehouse in SAP Datasphere. The feature list covers, for example, currency conversion, variables, and hierarchies.

entry.title: Re: Replacement of obsolete «Import/Export to-from Memory ID» operator
entry.content:

But better look for a recent version of ABAP - Shared Objects

entry.title: Future leave requests in Fiori when quotas run daily?
entry.content: We are looking to implement Fiori for Leave Requests and approvals. Our quotas are allocated daily. How does one handle future dated leave requests if not enough quota is available on the day of the request? E.g. an employee would like to submit leave for the end of the year, but on the day the request is created, not enough quota is available, but the employee will have enough quota by the dates he/she requested leave for?

entry.title: what is WOL ID? (in HANA)

Dear community, 

What is WOL ID in HANA? where to find technical resources about that. Please help to understand more. Thanks in advance.

entry.title: set_lowercase( ) from cl_salv_column_table not working
entry.content:
Hi,

I've tried all format combinations of Character and String, and the "case-sensitive" property on domains, but the text never changes - it's always displayed in the ALV as per the database. 

Anyone else having this issue?

 

TABLES: tvfk.
DATA: t_tvfk TYPE TABLE OF tvfk.
DATA: o_table TYPE REF TO cl_salv_table.
DATA: lo_columns TYPE REF TO cl_salv_columns_table,
      lo_column  TYPE REF TO cl_salv_column_table.
DATA: lt_columns TYPE salv_t_column_ref,
      ls_columns TYPE salv_s_column_ref.

START-OF-SELECTION.
  SELECT * FROM tvfk INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE t_tvfk UP TO 50 ROWS.
  cl_salv_table=>factory( IMPORTING
                                r_salv_table = o_table
                          CHANGING
                                t_table      = t_tvfk ).
  lo_columns = o_table->get_columns( ).
  lt_columns = lo_columns->get( ).
  LOOP AT lt_columns INTO ls_columns.
    TRY.
        lo_column ?= lo_columns->get_column( columnname = ls_columns-columnname ).
      CATCH cx_salv_not_found.
        RETURN.
    ENDTRY.
    CASE ls_columns-columnname.
      WHEN 'VBTYP'. "has lower case property checked
        lo_column->set_lowercase( abap_true ).

      WHEN 'ERNAM'. "does not have lower case property checked
        lo_column->set_lowercase( abap_true ).

      WHEN OTHERS.
        lo_column->set_visible( abap_false ).
    ENDCASE.
  ENDLOOP.
* display
  o_table->display( ).

entry.title: Operation Overlapping in Production order- PP
entry.content:
My order qty is 100 PC with required overlapping, min overlap time as 2 HR, min send ahead qty 1. Still second operation is not overlapping with 1st operation. 2nd operation starts only after the 1st is completed.

Any idea why overlapping is not happening?

entry.title: Re: GRDC Enter Document Type Total - wrong delta
entry.content:
Could you check that the data loaded on PL0C did not contain additional field values. You should not use any fields on important document types (defined as read doc types) that are not part of the forms structure. I.e. if the forms contains data where in the data base more fields are used then available in the forms structure it is only suitable for displaying data, not changing data.

The symptom that you describe typically results from such "incompatible" form layouts. Note that there is currently the restriction in the forms that it needs to contain all fields that are used in the data read (from any read doc types). 

This restriction is planned to be removed with this roadmap innovation.

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud ALM API & Integration: Several extensions of SAP Cloud ALM with SAP BTP (Part 3): Use

once I try to make test I got 500 error!

 

My user roles on the SAP cloud ALM side are following

 

 

would be nice if you can share your Destination Link data as well as Service Key API (how you integrated this 2 things)  . I think I'm doing something wrong in this part of the configuration !

Thank you in advance for your help.

BM

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello,

I'm Souhail Lahlal, a production planner who used SAP as an end user, particularly the MM and PP modules. I've become really interested in the field and see it as a promising path to transition into SAP consulting within Logistics and Supply Chain.

Coming from Morocco, the SAP Digital Skills program has given me hope that earning an SAP certification could significantly improve my job prospects and career growth. I'm truly grateful for the opportunity SAP provides.

I've already started taking courses on the SAP learning platform, and I'm excited to continue exploring more learning paths. Below is a screenshot of the courses I've completed so far.

I hope to hear from you soon and offer my best regards.

entry.title: BAPI/FM for Service order quotations rejections
entry.content:
I have to reject Service order quotations with a reason code from my ABAP program.

Thanks in advance

entry.title: Re: Using Job Scheduler in SAP Cloud Platform [0]: Intro and Prep
entry.content:
Hi @joergdw,
In the next blog Using Job Scheduler in SAP Cloud Platform [1]: First simple scenario the specific order is described:

    the order of binding is relevant:
    First bind XSUAA -> then JobScheduler
    Again: remember: Binding: XSUAA first

This is related to how Job Scheduling service is fetching a token from XSUAA to authenticate against your application.

entry.title: Market Segments Apps showing unusual fiscal periods
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

in the Apps Market Segment Acutal & Market Segment Plan/Acutal. The system is allowing strange choices for the fiscal period.

Using the entry help for 'fiscal period' suggests entries ranging from 0 to 366:

If I enter a 'strange' period I get the following message

 

 

The regular periods 1-9 are working just as intended, also 1-14 for last year.

Could you kindly explain the what is going on, so I can forward your answer to my wondering customer.

Thank you and best regards

Philipp

entry.title: Re: TS-Based Supply Optimizer finishes before Maximum Sol...
entry.content: (see other comment)

entry.title: Re: TS-Based Supply Optimizer finishes before Maximum Sol...
entry.content:
Hi Vincent, thanks for the case.

As answered there, the technical gap for product decomposition is a percentage. I.e. 2.761e-05% = 2.761e-07 < 1e6 (optimality gap).

entry.title: Fiori App Screen Variants
entry.content:
Hi Community,
I have a requirement where I need to disable certain fields, tabs for an fiori app and to enable for certain users only.

Earlier via SAP GUI, we were able to achieve this via SHD0 but for UI5 Fiori app I am not sure how to achieve this. Any assists are appreciated.

entry.title: Archived MDG Change Request isn't listed in "Display Change Requests" app
entry.content:
We need to archive MDG change requests and followed following sources:

Data Archiving in MDG | SAP Help Portal

https://me.sap.com/notes/2574330

Archiving and deletion of change requests in SAP M... - SAP Community

We also activated SAP_USMD_CR with tcode SARI.

We then use the tcode SARA to ‘Write' the relevant CR. In this situation, the change request is still available in the MDG applications and in the USMD120C table.

After ‘Delete’ and completing the archiving session, the data is no longer displayed in the ‘Display Change Requests’ app. In "Archive Administration: Archive File Detail" I get following information:

I tried different variants but never got an archived CR back in the Display Change Requests app. And added a sign at "Include Archived Change Requests".

Following questions

- Where can I configure the app so that it can access the corresponding archive files?

- Is this a system error?

Could you take a look at my issue? - perhaps you already have the solution at hand

Archived MDG Change Request isn't listed in "Displ... - SAP Community

Thank you for your support in advance!

entry.title: Re: setting data with SetDataSource in c#
entry.content:
Hi Adam,

In DataSet1_Click note the routine does look for each subreport but it uses the same DS as the main report. So you do need to use 2 queries, one for the main report to dump into DS and then another one for the subreport and dump that into DSSub().

The Dataset for the subreport should not have any filters on it, all the data should be there, it's possible you are filtering the subreport query so it only returns one row. CR will filter the data when the report is ran per the subreport Data Link.

As for the same subreport data I suspect either the query is not returning all data for the subreports or the Parameter is the same for each.

I can't say for sure why but I find exporting the Report to RPT format saves data with the report so you can then open the new report in CR Designer and have a look at what the SQL is for the subreport and if the Subreport links are there.

You could also enable CRLogger, CR's database logging component and look at the log to see what the subreport is doing, compare it the CR Designer logs to see what it's doing in your app.

1653533 - How to debug database issues using crlogger logs on Windows and Linux

1701312 - How to analyze CR Logger trace logs

Here's a routine for exporting to RPT format in code:

if (ExportTypeSelected == "crReportExportFormatCrystalReports")
#region RPT
{
    // This works do not alter
    // this gets the report name and sets the export name to be the same less the extension
    string outputFileName = "";
    string MyRptName = rpt.FileName.ToString();
    outputFileName = MyRptName.Substring(9, rpt.FileName.Length - 9);
    outputFileName = outputFileName.Substring(0, (outputFileName.Length - 4)) + "1.rpt";

    try
    {
        if (File.Exists(outputFileName))
        {
            File.Delete(outputFileName);
        }

        CrystalDecisions.ReportAppServer.ReportDefModel.RPTExportFormatOptions RasRPTExpOpts = new RPTExportFormatOptions();

        try
        {
            //RasRPTExpOpts = rptClientDoc.get_SavedExportOptions(CrReportExportFormatEnum.crReportExportFormatCrystalReports);
        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            btnSQLStatement.Text = "ERROR: " + ex.Message;
            //return;
        }

        // Set them now:
        //RasPDFExpOpts.CreateBookmarksFromGroupTree = false;
        //RasPDFExpOpts.EndPageNumber = 1;
        //RasPDFExpOpts.StartPageNumber = 1;

        CrystalDecisions.ReportAppServer.ReportDefModel.ExportOptions exportOpts1 = new CrystalDecisions.ReportAppServer.ReportDefModel.ExportOptions();
        exportOpts1.ExportFormatType = CrReportExportFormatEnum.crReportExportFormatCrystalReports;
        exportOpts1.FormatOptions = RasRPTExpOpts;

        // And Export
        rptClientDoc.PrintOutputController.ExportEx(exportOpts1).Save(outputFileName, true);
        MessageBox.Show("Export to RPT Completed. NOTE: report is *1.RPT", "", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Information);

    }
    catch (Exception ex)
    {
        btnSQLStatement.Text = "ERROR: " + ex.Message;
        return;
    }
    // This works do not alter
}
#endregion RPT

entry.title: Re: Task 2 - CDS View Entity Associations ( August Developer Challenge )

entry.title: se319 - when deleting SES
entry.content:
Dear All,

Service PO created with one PO line item and 10 service line items (without service No.)

For Service line item 6 and 7 , Service entry sheet created and GRN also posted in the background.

In the SES display, it is showing all the 9 line items with zero quantity except 6 and 7.

After GR user has manually revoked the Acceptance indicator.

Now client want to delete the service entry sheet but it is showing error as"Please enter the quantity SE319".

If i enter quantity then following error displays "SE363 Quantity exceeds the quantity in purchase order"

Please suggest how to delete the service entry sheet.

entry.title: Re: Find IMG linked to Table TCK35
entry.content: Try this to see if it works for you. Run SM30 and then in the table/view field put V_CK35

entry.title: Re: GRDC Enter Document Type Total - wrong delta
entry.content: Hi Florian, thanks a lot for your comment. I understood that the write intersection of the input form should be the same of the read intersection. When I uploaded the data also the dimension CO Area was populated. I add as dimension in the filter of the input form the dimension CO AREA and it works now

entry.title: Avoiding Calculation Errors in the CPQ Iron Python Script Workbench
entry.content:
Hey Readers,

Hope you all are doing great!

In this article I would like to share a tiny tip to prevent calculation errors on the CPQ iron python script workbench. We typically expect the decimal output while dividing smaller value by greater value. For example: when dividing 2 by 3, we expect the result to be 0.66... However, in the CPQ python workbench, it is recommended to include ".0" after the numerator when performing such calculations. Instead of using 2/3, it is advised to use 2.0/3. By following this recommendation, you can avoid receiving 0 as the result in your CPQ python workbench

otherwise, you receive 0 as your result in the CPQ python workbench.

I hope this article may help you.

Stay tuned!!!

Best Regards,

Abirami 🙂

entry.title: ABAP Calling last calling program in the stack
entry.content:
Hello experts,

  I have a program (webdynpro - 400) screen and button on the screen. It's calling another program (+ transaction) having selection screen and after execution ALV grid displayed. After performing work it should back to original calling screen having webdynpro screen (400).

ZPROGRAM1 (Screen 400) -> Call Transaction - ZPROGRAM2 (+selection screen) -> ALV screen and then back with same sequence.

We have tried with, AT SELECTION SCREEN EXIT-COMMAND and leave 0 or set screen 0 but somehow it is not working. CALL SCREEN will not work since it back button is in another program which is called.

How to call previous screens which are in call stack.

Regards,

PD

entry.title: SAP Security Update: June 2024 Vulnerabilities Review (video)
entry.content:
Hey SAP Community!

I've just released a new video covering the latest SAP security patches from June 2024. In this quick overview, we dive into 13 critical vulnerabilities that SAP has addressed.

Key highlights:
- Cross-site scripting in Financial Consolidation
- Denial-of-service vulnerabilities in AS Java and ABAP platforms
- Unrestricted file upload issues
- Missing authorization checks in various modules

The video provides a taste of the in-depth analysis, including code-level explanations and practical demonstrations using SAP transactions like SNOTE.

Interested in the full review? I've created a comprehensive course that goes into much more detail. Check out the QR code at the end of the video to access the complete course.

 

SAP Note Title

3457592Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) vulnerabilities in SAP Financial Consolidation
3460407Denial of service (DOS) in SAP NetWeaver AS Java (Meta Model Repository)
3453170Denial of service (DOS) in SAP NetWeaver and ABAP platform
3459379Unrestricted file upload in SAP Document Builder (HTTP service)
3466175Missing Authorization check in SAP S/4HANA (Manage Incoming Payment Files)
3465129Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) vulnerability in SAP CRM (WebClient UI)
3450286Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) vulnerability in SAP NetWeaver Application Server ABAP and ABAP Platform
3465455Missing Authorization check in SAP BW/4HANA Transformation and DTP
3457265Missing Authorization check in SAP Student Life Cycle Management (SLcM)
3425571Information Disclosure vulnerability in SAP NetWeaver AS Java (Guided Procedures)
2638217Switchable Authorization Checks in Central Finance Infrastructure Components
3441817Information Disclosure vulnerability in SAP BusinessObjects Business Intelligence Platform (Scheduling)
3392049Missing Authorization check in SAP Bank Account Management

#SAPSecurity #Vulnerabilities #ContinuousLearning

entry.title: Asset - Error oData – OrderTypes
entry.content:
I'm configuring the ASSET environment to use PM, carrying out the documentation I got an oData error that I can't follow.

Error in the application log

I'BTP event log.

 

Have any of your colleagues experienced this type of problem and could provide guidance?

entry.title: Re: SAP learning system through EMI payment subscription
entry.content:
Hi @Shubham_J 
To access the guided, premium learning resources, you need to have either an SAP Learning Hub or SAP Learning Hub, partner edition (available only for SAP partners) subscription. 

Students can get SAP-certified at a discounted student rate! It can be a game-changer that sets you apart in the job market and opens the door to exciting opportunities. Please access our Student Zone  for details.

We also run the Digital Skills Initiative designed to break down barriers and open the path to fulfilling careers in technology for everyone. Whether you're just starting, seeking a career shift, returning to the workforce as a veteran, or exploring new horizons, we're here to help. Please access our Digital skills for SAP website  for details and check if you are eligible.

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: Cloud ALM Monitoring Alerts are grouped
entry.content: Dear Ajay,

entry.title: Re: Connection between tables in SAC
entry.content:
Hello,

Which tables: transactional or master data?

Tables with transactional data might be connected outside SAC before importing.

Alternatively, you can import each table in separate models and then connect them in a final model.

Br, Oleksandr

entry.title: Re: ABAP Test Cockpit in the Cloud – How to use baseline
entry.content:
Hi Nitin,

you could try to recreate this role "Create from template" (SAP_BR_QUALITY_MNGR_SW_DEV) and assign it to the users again. Sometimes it helps.

Kind Regards,
Olga.

entry.title: Is it possible to ignore some characters of field inside of select?
entry.content:
Hi, experts.
Is it possible to ignore some characters of field inside of select?
The field xblnr has 'letters and numbers', is it possible to ignore letter part and to compare only the number part?

  LOOP at lt_eschf_docli into ls_eschf_docli.
    select * from bkpf APPENDING CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE BKPF_INT
      WHERE
        bkpf~xblnr  = ls_eschf_docli-sernr
        and bukrs = 1000
        and  bldat = LS_ESCHF_DOCLI-ZDATE.
